task.title: Create {endpoint} API endpoint
task.description: Complete the following task: Create {endpoint} API endpoint. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT modify anything under tests/.
Do NOT change the database schema.
success_criteria: New functionality is covered by tests.

steps.thought: I'll look at the API documentation first.
steps.observation:
# queue Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "queue-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
queue_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
